---
id: organization-secret-update
title: "Update an existing secret"
description: "Update an existing secret. If the secret is protected, only its value can be overridden."
sidebar_label: "Update an existing secret"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "patch api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update an existing secret"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/organizations/{org-slug}/secrets/{secret-name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update an existing secret. If the secret is protected, only its value can be overridden.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
